interpretation.claim_level: formula/schema helper alignment only; not a successful trainable diffusion dataset
interpretation.next_required_step: Rebuild teacher rollout state-latent windows from continuous MuJoCo/IsaacLab rollouts using the paper hybrid state representation, then rerun the code/formula appendix gate.

permission.reason: The reusable schema/projection code is corrected, but the actual trainable rollout dataset still needs to be rebuilt and re-audited with this schema.

rows.contract: Paper S3 hybrid state source is readable
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Paper states root features in current yaw frame and body features in local root frames.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Restore paper source files before claiming formula-level state alignment.

rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: 3 root position + 6 rot6d + 3 linear velocity + 3 angular velocity = 15.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Keep root_dim=15 in reusable helpers and downstream training scripts.

rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: 14 target bodies * (3 local position + 3 local velocity) = 84.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Use the same target-body set when rebuilding the trainable state-latent dataset.
Reject 160-D policy observations or other non-paper features before diffusion training.

rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Projected dimension = 99 + 64 Gaussian emphasis rows = 163 with P shape [163, 99]; c=6 scales root features.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Do not use the previous 18-D-root / 207-D projected state default or a mistaken 6*root_dim row count.

rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Projected states recover original 99-D states through P pseudoinverse.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Fix projection or inverse before training diffusion on projected states.

rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Paper diffusion state must not silently accept 160-D tracking policy observations.
rows.observed_in_current_project: dimension_error=hybrid state last dim must be 99, got (2, 160)
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Keep shape validation at all state-latent dataset construction boundaries.

rows.contract: Trainable state-latent dataset rebuilt with corrected schema
rows.expected_from_paper_or_gate: Long downstream VAE/diffusion training should use freshly rebuilt 99-D hybrid states, not stale debug windows.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training: Rebuild the trainable teacher rollout/state-latent dataset with root/body hybrid features, OU noise collection, 5s rejection, and symmetry augmentation before long VAE/diffusion training.
